faithfulness.description: Answer claims are supported by synthetic tool results and cited knowledge.

helpfulness.description: Answer directly addresses the request and gives an actionable next step.

policy_adherence.description: Answer follows VoltEdge synthetic policy and required HITL outcomes.

notes: The judge model remains unresolved in GitHub issue #25.
A scenario can pass only when programmatic checks pass and every judge dimension meets its task threshold.
Local-stub runs record judge status as not_run and cannot produce an overall pass.
